title: Paul Anthony 'Pro Series T4' USB-C Lithium Beard & Stubble Trimmer with LCD Display and 40 Lockable Trimming Depths from 0.5mm to 20mm - H5135
features: LITHIUM POWER - The high power, ultra-fast charging lithium-ion battery is ready to use in less than 5 minutes. It is fully charged in around 2 hours, which will provide approximately 90 minutes of operation. Use any USB 5v DC power source, but 2100mAh recommended.
ADJUSTABLE - Fully adjustable and lockable with 40 different settings to choose from. 0.5mm to 20mm in 0.5mm intervals.
LCD DISPLAY - The integrated LCD display shows the percentage of battery remaining before charge.
32MM WIDE - The 32mm wide high carbon stainless steel blades are perfectly designed for optimum manouverability, comfort and precision.
USB-C - This professional trimmer comes with a USB Charging cable only. A USB Power source is needed.
description: Product Description The Paul Anthony 'Pro Series T4' USB-C Lithium Beard & Stubble Trimmer offers quiet, smooth and precise trimming performance with optimum control. Charging by any USB source and withing 5 minutes of charging the Trimmer is ready for action. A full charge takes 2 hours and will give upto 90 minutes of continuous use. The built in LCD Display shows you the amount of charge left in the battery before you need to recharge. The Paul Anthony Pro Series T4 comes with two individual combs that are adjustable to 20 settings each, offering full lockable control of each setting from 0.5mm to 20mm providing opportunities to trim bears from a shadow stubble to a neat thick beard. Accessories include a comb, scissors and oil. Included in the box: 1x Paul Anthony Pro Series T4 Beard & Stubble Trimmer 2x Combs Attachments 1x USB Cable 1x Barbers Comb 1x Scissors 1x Oil 1x Manual Safety Warning Always use with caution to avoid cuts. Do not use near water or while charging.
